languages.text: "Я хочу знать, как ты оказался в плену, чтобы не повторить тех же ошибок".
"I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."
languages.original_text: "Я хочу знать, как ты оказался в плену, чтобы не повторить тех же ошибок".

traits.locale_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."
"I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."
"I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."
"I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."
"I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

languages.text: 「あなたがなぜ捕らえられたのかを知りたいのです。そうすれば、同じ過ちを犯さないようにできます」
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたがなぜ捕らえられたのかを知りたいのです。そうすれば、同じ過ちを犯さないようにできます」

languages.text: “我想知道你是怎么被囚禁的，这样我才能避免犯同样的错误。”
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

traits.locale_text: “我想知道你是怎么被囚禁的，这样我才能避免犯同样的错误。”

languages.text: "Nasıl hapsedildiğini bilmek istiyorum ki ben de aynı hataları yapmaktan kaçınabileyim."
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl hapsedildiğini bilmek istiyorum ki ben de aynı hataları yapmaktan kaçınabileyim."

languages.text: «Me gustaría saber cómo acabó encerrado para evitar repetir los mismos errores».
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

traits.locale_text: «Me gustaría saber cómo acabó encerrado para evitar repetir los mismos errores».

languages.text: « J'aimerais savoir comment vous avez été emprisonné, pour éviter de commettre les mêmes erreurs. »
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais savoir comment vous avez été emprisonné, pour éviter de commettre les mêmes erreurs. »

languages.text: "Ich will wissen, wie Ihr in Gefangenschaft geraten seid, damit ich nicht dieselben Fehler mache."
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Ich will wissen, wie Ihr in Gefangenschaft geraten seid, damit ich nicht dieselben Fehler mache."
